Tests that the square root of -2 is NaN using Math.sqrt and isNaN functions.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.sqrt` function when given a negative number as input. It uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.sqrt(-2)` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number), which is the expected outcome according to the JavaScript specification. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating the correct handling of negative inputs by the square root function.
